skills.name: Docker Compose Generator
skills.description: Generate multi-service Docker Compose configurations with networking, volumes, and health checks.
skills.useCase: Spin up local dev environments quickly
skills.promptPreview: Create a Docker Compose file for [services list] with shared networking, persistent volumes, and health checks.

skills.name: CI/CD Pipeline Builder
skills.description: Design GitHub Actions or GitLab CI pipelines with testing, linting, and deployment stages.
skills.promptPreview: Create a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline for a [framework] project with lint, test, build, and deploy stages.

skills.name: Terraform Module Scaffolder
skills.description: Generate Terraform modules for common cloud infrastructure patterns on AWS, GCP, or Azure.
skills.promptPreview: Scaffold a Terraform module for [resource type] on [cloud provider] with variables, outputs, and a README.
